parts.text:
Generate a single character reference sheet illustration for: Rin.
Role: supporting.
Visual appearance: Rin is a lean, wiry woman in her mid-twenties with an athletic build honed by years of survival in harsh conditions. She stands at average height for a woman of Astralis, around 5'5", with a posture that radiates constant alertness. Her most striking feature is her hair—messy, chin-length dark brown hair with a slightly greenish tint from frequent exposure to contaminated water, styled in a practical disheveled manner that falls naturally without requiring maintenance. Her eyes are sharp and calculating, a distinctive pale amber color that seems to assess everything in her periphery. She has a narrow, angular face with high cheekbones and a pointed chin, giving her a fox-like appearance that complements her shrewd expression. A thin scar runs diagonally across her left eyebrow, a memento from a bad deal gone wrong in her early teens. Her skin is weathered but healthy, showing the telltale signs of wasteland living without being truly damaged. For clothing, she wears practical, layered garments in muted earth tones: a worn brown leather vest over a faded gray thermal shirt, cargo pants with numerous hidden pockets, and sturdy boots with reinforced soles. She accessorizes with various small pouches and belt pouches containing samples of her wares, as well as a pair of worn leather gloves that she never removes during business hours. Her hands show calluses from years of handling goods and the occasional necessary confrontation. A distinctive feature is the collection of small, simple metal tokens she wears threaded on a cord around her neck—each one representing a debt owed to her or by her, a visual reminder of the complex web of obligations that drives the underground economy..
Art style: Manhwa (Full Color).
Genre context: Isekai.
IMPORTANT: Do NOT include any speech bubbles, text, dialogue, captions, or written words in the image. Show only the character illustration with no text elements whatsoever.

Generate a single character reference sheet illustration for: Masako Saito.
Role: supporting.
Visual appearance: Masako is a woman in her late 40s with a weary but determined appearance. Her dark brown hair, streaked with premature gray, is typically pulled back into a practical bun that has begun to loosen from days of neglect. She has deep-set brown eyes surrounded by dark circles from years of sleepless nights, carrying a haunted look that flickers between hope and despair. Her face shows premature aging lines around her eyes and forehead from constant worry. She has a thin, somewhat frail build from working multiple jobs and often forgetting to eat, standing at average height. Her hands are rough and calloused from manual labor. She typically wears simple, worn-out clothing: an old cardigan over a faded blouse, comfortable but scuffed shoes, and carries a worn messenger bag filled with missing person flyers. A thin silver bracelet that once belonged to Kaito adorns her wrist—she never takes it off. Her most distinguishing feature is the haunted look in her eyes and the way she clutches her phone, constantly checking for any updates on missing persons databases..
Art style: Manhwa (Full Color).
Genre context: Isekai.
IMPORTANT: Do NOT include any speech bubbles, text, dialogue, captions, or written words in the image. Show only the character illustration with no text elements whatsoever.

Generate a single character reference sheet illustration for: Dr. Tanaka Hiroshi.
Role: supporting.
Visual appearance: Dr. Tanaka Hiroshi is a distinguished-looking man in his late 50s with an academic bearing. He stands at approximately 175cm with a slender, slightly stooped build from years bent over research benches. His hair is predominantly silver-gray, worn in a conservative side-parted style that frames a high forehead. His eyes are sharp and intelligent, dark brown in color, often visible behind rectangular wire-frame reading glasses with thin silver frames. He has a lean face with pronounced cheekbones, a straight nose, and thin lips that often settle into a thoughtful expression. His most distinguishing features are the fine lines around his eyes and mouth that speak of years of concentrated study, and slightly bushy gray eyebrows that give him an expression of perpetual contemplation. He typically wears a pristine white lab coat over his clothes, beneath which is a light blue dress shirt with a simple navy tie. His trousers are always pressed and formal, usually dark gray or navy. He carries a leather messenger bag filled with research notes and always has a tablet device for data analysis. His hands show age spots but remain steady and precise—perfect for delicate laboratory work. When not in the lab, he favors conservative sweaters in earth tones over dress shirts..
Art style: Manhwa (Full Color).
Genre context: Isekai.
IMPORTANT: Do NOT include any speech bubbles, text, dialogue, captions, or written words in the image. Show only the character illustration with no text elements whatsoever.

Generate a single character reference sheet illustration for: The Astral Gods.
Role: antagonist.
Visual appearance: The Astral Gods rarely manifest in physical form, instead appearing as towering silhouettes of divine energy—vast humanoid shapes wrapped in cascading robes of woven starlight and cosmic darkness. Their bodies shift between solid light and shadow, with multiple eyes that glow like dying stars scattered across their forms. When taking more defined shape, they appear as androgynous beings with pale, almost translucent skin that seems to glow from within, hair that flows like nebulae in shades of deep violet, silver, and black. Their eyes are entirely black with pinpricks of white light like distant galaxies, orbs of pure void that seem to see through all things. They wear elaborate ceremonial armor and robes adorned with symbols of Astralis—crystallized magic circles, planetary rings, and ancient runic patterns that pulse with faint light. Their voices echo multiplicely, as if many beings speak through one mouth. When they manifest, reality itself warps around them—space bends, time stutters, and the air fills with the scent of ozone and ancient dust. Each god appears slightly different in coloration and specific features, but all share an otherworldly, terrifying beauty..
Art style: Manhwa (Full Color).
Genre context: Isekai.
IMPORTANT: Do NOT include any speech bubbles, text, dialogue, captions, or written words in the image. Show only the character illustration with no text elements whatsoever.

Generate a reference image for the location/scene: The Divine Throne.
Description: A mystical location in Astralis where the Astral Gods convene and issue their proclamations to the citizens. It's a grand, otherworldly space that represents the divine authority driving the invasion plan..
Art style: Manhwa (Full Color).
Genre context: Isekai.
IMPORTANT: This is a background/environment scene ONLY. Do NOT include any characters, people, figures, speech bubbles, text, dialogue, captions, or written words in the image. Show only the location/scenery with no characters or text elements whatsoever.
